hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance teams link wallet activity, transaction risk and provider outputs into structured workflows that preserve audit evidence for source of funds review and regulatory reporting.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling

trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Source of funds records remain uncoordinated
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to maintain clear, audit-ready trail linking transactions to their source of funds. This disconnection creates gaps in case evidence and slows regulatory review for VASPs handling complex wallet and transaction risk data.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects wallet activity, transaction risk signals and source-of-funds data into unified cases with audit-ready evidence to help compliance teams maintain clear traceability and streamline regulatory reviews.
workflow_title: From wallet risk to source of funds review
workflow_description: SFTY links wallet and transaction risk signals through case creation, evidence preservation and documented decisions to build audit-ready source of funds records.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond wallet alerts. Audit-ready source of funds

why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for source of funds review?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects wallet risk, transaction monitoring and provider outputs to create a connected, auditable workflow for source of funds review and compliance within regulated digital asset businesses.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage source of funds workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures alerts into cases, links wallet and transaction data to customers, applies policies, and records reviewer actions to streamline and document source of funds investigations.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve source of funds evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves detailed audit trails, decision logs and evidence packages for source of funds reviews to support defensible compliance and regulatory readiness.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing KYT providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above KYT and blockchain analytics providers, integrating their signals into one compliance layer without disrupting existing workflows or provider relationships.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace current compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY complements and connects existing KYC, KYT and screening providers by turning their outputs into structured workflows, decisions and audit-ready records.
final_title: Build audit-ready source of funds workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY connects wallet activity, transaction risk and provider outputs into structured source of funds cases and evidence.
